title: Convert website to mobile app format with app-like UI/UX

requirements.text: Convert the existing website layout to a mobile app-like interface by implementing a bottom navigation bar for primary navigation instead of the current header-based navigation. The bottom nav should include icons and labels for Home, Services, Gallery, Testimonials, and Chat sections.

quotes: Can you make same website like a app

acceptanceCriteria: Bottom navigation bar is fixed at the bottom of the viewport on all customer-facing pages
Navigation items have icons and labels
Active navigation item is visually highlighted
Navigation bar is responsive and works on mobile, tablet, and desktop viewports

requirements.text: Update the Layout component to use a mobile app-style header with a minimal top bar showing only the company logo and essential actions (no horizontal navigation menu). Remove the current desktop-style navigation menu from the header.

quotes: Can you make same website like a app

acceptanceCriteria: Header displays company logo on the left
Header is compact and mobile-optimized
No horizontal navigation links in the header
Header remains consistent across all pages

requirements.text: Implement swipeable page transitions between main sections to provide native app-like navigation gestures. Users should be able to swipe left/right to navigate between Home, Services, Gallery, and Testimonials pages.

quotes: Can you make same website like a app

acceptanceCriteria: Horizontal swipe gestures navigate between adjacent pages
Smooth animated transitions when swiping
Visual feedback during swipe gesture
Swipe navigation works on touch devices

requirements.text: Add pull-to-refresh functionality on all customer-facing pages (Home, Services, Gallery, Testimonials) that reloads page data when the user pulls down from the top of the page, similar to native mobile apps.

quotes: Can you make same website like a app

acceptanceCriteria: Pull-down gesture triggers refresh animation
Data is refetched after pull-to-refresh
Loading indicator shows during refresh
Works on touch-enabled devices

requirements.text: Optimize all page layouts for mobile-first vertical scrolling with card-based designs and increased touch target sizes (minimum 44x44px). Redesign hero sections, service cards, project gallery items, and review cards to follow mobile app UI patterns.

quotes: Can you make same website like a app

acceptanceCriteria: All interactive elements meet minimum 44x44px touch target size
Content is organized in scrollable card-based layouts
Spacing and typography are optimized for mobile readability
Single-column layouts are prioritized for mobile viewports

requirements.text: Convert the chat widget to a full-screen modal chat interface that opens from the bottom navigation bar, similar to messaging apps. The chat should occupy the full screen when active and include a close/back button.

quotes: Can you make same website like a app

acceptanceCriteria: Chat opens as a full-screen overlay from the bottom nav
Chat interface follows mobile messaging app patterns
Back/close button returns to previous page
Message input is fixed at the bottom of the chat screen

requirements.text: Add haptic feedback (vibration) for key user interactions like button taps, form submissions, and navigation actions on devices that support the Vibration API, enhancing the native app feel.

quotes: Can you make same website like a app

acceptanceCriteria: Button taps trigger subtle haptic feedback
Form submissions provide haptic confirmation
Navigation changes include haptic feedback
Haptic feedback gracefully degrades on unsupported devices

requirements.text: Implement native-like loading states and skeleton screens for all data-fetching operations using smooth fade-in animations and shimmer effects, replacing traditional spinners where appropriate.

quotes: Can you make same website like a app

acceptanceCriteria: Skeleton screens display during initial page loads
Smooth fade-in animations when content loads
Shimmer effects on skeleton elements
Loading states match the layout of loaded content

requirements.text: Update the form pages (QuotationRequestPage, SubmitReviewPage) to use mobile-optimized form controls with bottom sheets for select inputs, date pickers, and large touch-friendly input fields with appropriate keyboard types.

quotes: Can you make same website like a app

acceptanceCriteria: Select inputs open as bottom sheet drawers
Date picker uses native mobile date input
Input fields are large and touch-friendly
Keyboard types match input context (numeric, email, etc.)

constraints: Do not modify the backend actor structure or data models
Maintain compatibility with existing authentication flows (Internet Identity and admin login)
Preserve all existing functionality while converting UI to app-like format
Do not change any immutable frontend paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Building an actual native iOS or Android app
Adding offline functionality or service workers
Creating a Progressive Web App (PWA) manifest
